narrative:
Licking Township B (precinct in Licking County) has 918 registered voters, with 48.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.2 percentage points.
